docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEORE JUDGE PRO TEM BETSY JOHNSEN FILED BY FARRINGTON, ELIZABETH
TRIAL RESET TO JUL-28-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-29-2009 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FARRINGTON, ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, KEVIN $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00, $5225.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT PLUS PENALTIES IS GREATER THAN $7500.00, AS PER 1950.5. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, KEVIN

DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE AND REQUEST FOR RESET DATE, FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-28-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-28-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: BETSY JOHNSEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED RE THE WRIT ISSUED ON 01/07/2016. WRIT RETAINED BY LOS ANGELES COUNTY SHERIFF PER CCP 563.7. SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY ASSIGNEE OF RECORD ON MAY 11, 2016. AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, KEVIN
